---
title: "Building Ethical Business Analytics Capacity for Professionals and University Students"
---

## Purpose
A free, open-access online learning program to help Indonesian professionals and final-year students build **practical and ethical business analytics skills** grounded in real workplace scenarios.

## Audience
Early-career professionals and final-year university students preparing for analytics roles.

## Module
### Module 1: Problem Definition & Decision Framing
### Module 2: Data Quality & Common Pitfalls
### Module 3: Responsible Analytics & Bias Awareness
### Module 4: Governance Basics (definitions, ownership, controls)
### Module 5: Communicating Insights for Action

## Outputs
- Short lesson notes (PDF/HTML)
- Practice exercises using anonymised datasets
- A feedback survey summary and improvements loop

## Links
- GitHub repository: `business-analytics-learning-program`
- Materials: slides, readings, exercises
